tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Nothings Gonna Change My Love For You

content:
"You’re The Inspiration"
(Chicago)


[Intro]

[ch]Ab[/ch] – [ch]Bb[/ch] - [ch]C[/ch] – [ch]Bb[/ch] - [ch]Ab[/ch] – [ch]Db[/ch] - [ch]Eb[/ch] – [ch]Ab[/ch]
[ch]Ab[/ch] – [ch]Bb[/ch] - [ch]C[/ch] – [ch]Bb[/ch] - [ch]Ab[/ch] – [ch]Db[/ch] - [ch]Eb[/ch] – [ch]Ab[/ch]

Bass: [ch]Ab[/ch] – [ch]Bb[/ch] - [ch]C[/ch] – [ch]Bb[/ch] - [ch]Ab[/ch] – [ch]Db[/ch] - [ch]Eb[/ch] – [ch]C[/ch]
Bass: [ch]C[/ch] – [ch]Db[/ch] - [ch]Eb[/ch] – [ch]Db[/ch] - [ch]C[/ch] – [ch]Ab[/ch] - [ch]Bb[/ch]


[Verse I]

[tab][ch]B[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]
You know our love was meant to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch] [ch]G#m/F#[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
The kind of love to last forever[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]
And I want you here with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch] [ch]G#m/F#[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
From tonight until the end of time[/tab]


[Pre-chorus I]

[tab][ch]F#/A#[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]
You should know[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Everywhere I go[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#[/ch] [ch]G#m[/ch]
Always on my mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]
In my heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
In my soul, baby[/tab]


[Chorus I]

[tab][ch]D#[/ch]
You're the meaning in my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch] [ch]D#[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
You're the inspiration[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#[/ch] [ch]D#[/ch]
You bring feeling to my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch] [ch]D#[/ch] [ch]A#[/ch]
You're the inspiration[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch] [ch]C#[/ch]
Wanna have you near me[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch] [ch]C#[/ch]
I wanna have you hear me saying,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch] [ch]G#m[/ch] [ch]C#7sus[/ch] - [ch]C#7[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]
No one needs you more than I need you[/tab]


[Interlude]

[ch]F#[/ch]
[ch]B[/ch] – [ch]C#[/ch] - [ch]D#[/ch] – [ch]C#[/ch] - [ch]B[/ch] – [ch]C#[/ch]


[Verse II]

[tab][ch]B[/ch]
And I know (And I know)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
Yes I know that it's plain to see[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch] [ch]G#m/F#[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
So in love when we're together[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
Now I know (Now I know)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#/D#[/ch]
That I need you here with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch] [ch]G#m/F#[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
From tonight until the end of time[/tab]


[Pre-chorus II]

[tab][ch]F#/A#[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]

Everywhere I go[/tab]

[tab][ch]D#[/ch]
